footer.slogan: Your Gateway to Funded Trading and Financial Freedom

terms.title: Terms of Service for PropView
terms.lastUpdated: Revised and posted as of: March 17, 2026
terms.intro1: Please read these Terms of Service ("Terms") carefully before using the PropView website (propview.co.kr) or any other PropView services, products, or channels (collectively, the "Service").
terms.intro2: By accessing or using our Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must immediately cease all use of the Service.
terms.s1_1: All information, data, text, graphics, charts, and software displayed on PropView (collectively, the "Content") are the intellectual property of PropView or its licensors. You may use the Content solely for personal, non-commercial, and informational purposes.
terms.s1_2: PropView actively protects its proprietary rights. No part of the Content may be reproduced, redistributed, or sold without prior written consent from PropView.
terms.s2_1: To access certain features, you must register for an account. PropView provides account registration through Google OAuth and traditional email sign-up via Supabase.
terms.s2_2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and current information at all times.
terms.s2_3: One Account Per User: PropView strictly enforces a "one account per individual" policy. The use of multiple accounts by a single user is prohibited and may lead to immediate termination of all associated accounts.
terms.s3_1: FOR INFORMATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY: THE CONTENT PROVIDED ON PROPVIEW, INCLUDING PROP FIRM ANALYTICS, TRADING STRATEGIES, AND MARKET DATA, IS FOR INFORMATIONAL AND EDUCATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY.
terms.s3_2: NOT INVESTMENT ADVICE: PROPVIEW IS NOT A REGISTERED INVESTMENT ADVISOR, BROKER-DEALER, OR FINANCIAL INSTITUTION. NOTHING ON THE WEBSITE CONSTITUTES A SOLICITATION, RECOMMENDATION, OR ENDORSEMENT TO BUY OR SELL ANY FINANCIAL INSTRUMENT OR TO ENGAGE IN ANY SPECIFIC TRADING STRATEGY.
terms.s3_3: RISK ACKNOWLEDGMENT: TRADING INVOLVES SUBSTANTIAL RISK. PROPVIEW SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY FINANCIAL LOSSES RESULTING FROM THE USE OF INFORMATION PROVIDED ON THE SERVICE. YOU ARE SOLELY RESPONSIBLE FOR YOUR OWN INVESTMENT DECISIONS.
terms.s4Intro: By using PropView, you agree not to:
terms.s4_1: Alter, copy, or redistribute any Content without authorization.
terms.s4_2: Use any data mining, robots, or similar data gathering and extraction methods.
terms.s4_3: Post unauthorized commercial advertisements or "referral links" unless explicitly permitted.
terms.s4_4: Engage in any activity that imposes an unreasonable load on our infrastructure.
terms.s5: PropView reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to terminate or restrict your access to the Service at any time, without notice, for any reason, including but not limited to a breach of these Terms or suspected fraudulent activity.
terms.s6_1: Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall be settled through good-faith negotiations.
terms.s6_2: If a resolution cannot be reached, the dispute shall be submitted to the Korean Commercial Arbitration Board (KCAB) for binding arbitration in accordance with its rules. The arbitration shall be conducted in Seoul, South Korea.
terms.s7: PropView reserves the right to change or modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the website. Your continued use of the Service after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.s8Intro: If you have any questions or problems regarding these Terms, please contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for PropView
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy ("Policy") outlines how PropView ("we," "us," or "our") collects, uses, and discloses information on our platform. By engaging with our website, including propview.co.kr, and utilizing our services (the "Services"), you agree to the terms of this Policy.
privacy.s1Intro: We collect information that identifies, relates to, or could reasonably be linked to you.
privacy.s1Reg: Registration Data: When you register via Google OAuth, we receive your email address, name, and profile image URL. If you sign up via email, we collect your email address.
privacy.s1Inq: Inquiries: Any information you provide when contacting our support team.
privacy.s1Tech: Technical Data: IP address, browser type, operating system, and access logs.
privacy.s1Local: LocalStorage & Cookies: We use LocalStorage (managed via Supabase) to maintain your authentication session. This data stays on your browser and is essential for the Service to function.
privacy.s1ThirdP: We obtain verification data from Google to facilitate secure social login and account creation.
privacy.s2Intro: We use the collected information for the following business purposes:
privacy.s2_1: Service Delivery: To authenticate your account and provide access to community features and prop firm analytics.
privacy.s2_2: Communication: To respond to your requests and send critical updates regarding the Service.
privacy.s2_3: Security & Integrity: To prevent fraud, multi-account abuse, and to enforce our Terms of Service.
privacy.s2_4: Improvement: To analyze user trends and optimize our analytical tools for better trading insights.
privacy.s3Intro: PropView does not sell your personal information. Disclosure is limited to:
privacy.s3_1: Infrastructure Providers: We share necessary data with Supabase (Database/Auth) and Vercel (Hosting) to maintain the platform.
privacy.s3_2: Legal Compliance: When required by law or to protect the safety of our users and the public.
privacy.s3_3: Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, sale, or financing transaction.
privacy.s4Intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights:
privacy.s4_1: Access & Correction: Review and update your account data in the settings.
privacy.s4_2: Data Deletion: You may request account deletion. Personal identifiers will be purged, though certain public posts may be anonymized and retained for community continuity.
privacy.s4_3: Withdrawal of Consent: You may withdraw your consent for data processing at any time by contacting us.
privacy.s4Contact: To exercise these rights, please contact:
privacy.s5: We implement administrative and technical safeguards to protect your personal information. Data is retained only as long as necessary for business purposes. Certain anonymized logs may be stored indefinitely for security auditing and to prevent recurring abuse.
privacy.s6: PropView is intended for users ages 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect information from individuals under 18. If such data is discovered, it will be deleted immediately.
privacy.s7Intro: For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

communityPolicy.title: Community Operation Policy (커뮤니티 운영정책)
communityPolicy.intro: PropView 커뮤니티는 프랍 트레이더들이 자유롭게 전략을 공유하고, 업체 정보를 비교하며, 건강한 투자 문화를 만들어가는 공간입니다.
communityPolicy.s1_1: Registration: 구글(Google) 소셜 로그인 및 이메일 가입을 지원합니다.
communityPolicy.s1_2: One Account Rule: 1인 1계정 원칙을 엄격히 준수합니다. 다중 계정 적발 시 모든 관련 계정이 영구 정지될 수 있습니다.
communityPolicy.s1_3: Nickname: 닉네임은 한 달에 한 번 변경 가능하며, 타인을 사칭하거나 특정 업체/브랜드명을 무단 사용하는 경우 제재를 받을 수 있습니다.
communityPolicy.s1_4: Withdrawal: 탈퇴 후 30일간 재가입이 제한됩니다. 탈퇴 시 작성한 게시글은 자동 삭제되지 않으므로, 삭제를 원하실 경우 탈퇴 전 직접 관리하시기 바랍니다.
communityPolicy.s2_1: Today's Strategy (오늘의 전략): 본 게시판은 운영진(Admin) 및 'Verified Trader' 배지를 획득한 트레이더만 게시글을 작성할 수 있습니다. 일반 회원은 모든 콘텐츠를 자유롭게 열람하고 댓글로 소통할 수 있습니다.
communityPolicy.s2_2: General Boards: '출금 인증', '자유게시판' 등은 모든 회원이 자유롭게 글을 작성할 수 있습니다.
communityPolicy.s2_3: Writing Policy: 무분별한 도배 방지를 위해 모든 게시판에는 글 작성 후 10초의 대기 시간이 적용됩니다.
communityPolicy.s3Title: 3. Points, Credits & Levels (활동 보상 및 등급)
communityPolicy.s3_1: Point (포인트): 출석체크, 게시글 작성, 댓글 활동 등을 통해 획득하는 활동 지수입니다.
communityPolicy.s3_2: Leveling System: 별도의 XP 없이 획득한 포인트 합계에 따라 5단계(별 개수·에메랄드 크라운)가 자동으로 결정됩니다.
communityPolicy.s3_3: Strategy Reward: '오늘의 전략' 게시판에 전문적인 전략을 게시할 경우, 일반 게시글보다 높은 포인트와 함께 크레딧(Credit) 보상이 차등 지급됩니다.
communityPolicy.s3_4: Credit (크레딧): 에어드롭 상점이나 혜택 교환에 사용되는 재화로, 전략 포스팅 보상이나 이벤트를 통해 획득할 수 있습니다.
communityPolicy.s4Intro: 아래 행위 적발 시 서비스 이용이 영구 정지될 수 있습니다.
communityPolicy.s4_1: Abuse: 타인의 수익 인증샷 혹은 매매 전략 무단 복제 및 도용.
communityPolicy.s4_2: Spam: 운영진 승인 없는 상업적 광고, 레퍼럴 코드 도배.
communityPolicy.s4_3: Falsification: 프랍 업체에 대한 허위 사실 유포 및 투자자 선동 행위.
communityPolicy.s4_4: Harassment: 욕설, 비하, 특정 집단에 대한 혐오 표현 및 트레이더에 대한 인신공격.
communityPolicy.s4_5: Financial Loss: 투자 유도, 개인 계좌를 통한 후원 요청 등 금전적 사고 유발 행위.
communityPolicy.s5Benefit1: 신뢰의 상징: 실제 프랍 업체로부터의 수익/출금 내역을 인증한 유저에게는 닉네임 앞에 'Verified Trader'를 상징하는 🔰 배지가 영구적으로 부여됩니다.
communityPolicy.s5Benefit2: 전략 작성 권한: 오직 🔰 배지를 보유한 유저만이 [오늘의 전략] 게시판에 본인의 매매 기법과 관점을 공유할 수 있습니다. (실력자들만의 고품격 정보 공유를 지향합니다.)
communityPolicy.s5Method: 출금 인증 게시판에 프랍 회사의 출금 완료 내역(스크린샷)과 금액을 포함하여 글을 작성해 주세요. 운영진의 검토 및 승인 후, 즉시 닉네임 앞에 배지가 적용되며 모든 권한이 활성화됩니다.
